# Moh-AI Tech

> Moh-AI Tech (Mastering Outstanding Horizons) is an MSME-registered AI and IT company based in Namakkal, India, specializing in enterprise AI solutions, RAG chatbots, computer vision architectures, and custom full-stack web applications.

## Overview
- **Name:** Moh-AI Tech
- **Founder & CEO:** Mohan Kumar Subramanian
- **Location:** Namakkal, Tamil Nadu, India
- **MSME Registration:** UDYAM-TN-14-0088280
- **Official Website:** https://moh-ai-tech.com

## Core Capabilities
Moh-AI Tech provides custom engineering tailored to enterprise needs. We do not use bloated platforms; we build direct solutions.

1. **Autonomous AI Agents & Workflows:**
   - Tech Stack: LangChain, FastAPI
   - Use cases: System-wide automated report generation, invoice processing, recruiting agents (HR Recruiter AI compresses time-to-interview metrics by 75%).

2. **Computer Vision:**
   - Tech Stack: PyTorch, OpenCV
   - Use cases: Real-time industrial defect monitoring, automated optical inspection.

3. **Intelligent Web Platforms:**
   - Tech Stack: React.js, Next.js, TailwindCSS
   - Use cases: Fast, responsive enterprise applications housing complex machine learning logic.

4. **Custom Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG):**
   - Tech Stack: PostgreSQL (pgvector), Vector DBs
   - Use cases: Secure enterprise chatbots querying private corporate data, such as Docu-Mind (targets 90% reduction in manual data entry timelines).

## Products
- **Docu-Mind:** Intelligent Document Understanding system. Extracts structured JSON data instantly from invoices, forms, and contracts for ERP/CRM.
- **HR Recruiter AI:** Autonomous Talent Acquisition agent that screens resumes and conducts initial conversational interviews.

## Engagement Models
1. **Fixed-Price Project:** Milestone-based quotes for MVPs, chatbots, and web launches.
2. **Monthly Retainer:** Predictable flat fees for continuous AI optimization and scaling.
3. **Dedicated AI Team:** On-demand product squads for full-scale custom AI integration.
4. **Consulting & Advisory:** Hourly/daily rates for architecture design and AI feasibility studies.

## Contact Information
- **Email:** info@moh-ai-tech.com
- **Contact Form:** https://moh-ai-tech.com/#contact
